text:
Once upon an English afternoon.

There was a writer named Emma. Emma loved to walk in quiet places near her home. One day she wandered into a forest.

There she found an owl. The owl spoke softly.

"Would you like to write?"

Emma thought. Later she did. Emma wrote stories. But she felt empty.

Sometimes she thought she would hike alone.

Then one dusk owl stole her thoughts.

"She wants friends."

So owl wrote letters.

Once owl wrote "You."

One day owl came true.

They flew side by side.

They explored.

Then owl wrote always.

That owl loved Emma. That owl might save her.

Perhaps one day Emma might save something too.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
